query:
INSERT INTO tachyon_apps_order.products (
                id, tenant_id, name, description, status,
                sku_code, jan_code, upc_code, kind,
                billing_cycle, list_price, publication_status,
                publication_name, publication_description,
                file_ids,
                category_id, weight_grams,
                created_at, updated_at
            ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
            ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
                name = VALUES(name),
                description = VALUES(description),
                status = VALUES(status),
                sku_code = VALUES(sku_code),
                jan_code = VALUES(jan_code),
                upc_code = VALUES(upc_code),
                kind = VALUES(kind),
                billing_cycle = VALUES(billing_cycle),
                list_price = VALUES(list_price),
                publication_status = VALUES(publication_status),
                publication_name = VALUES(publication_name),
                publication_description = VALUES(publication_description),
                file_ids = VALUES(file_ids),
                category_id = VALUES(category_id),
                weight_grams = VALUES(weight_grams),
                updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
